---
title: "Research"
listing:
  - id: articles
    contents: "articles/*/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    template: ../html/research/listing.ejs
    categories: true
  - id: in-reviews
    contents: "in-reviews/*/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    template: ../html/research/listing.ejs
  - id: conference-papers
    contents: "conference-papers/*/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    template: ../html/research/listing.ejs
  - id: working-papers
    contents: "working-papers/*/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    template: ../html/research/listing.ejs
  - id: book-chapters
    contents: "chapters/*/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    template: ../html/research/listing.ejs
page-layout: full
include-back-link: false
toc-location: right
---

Welcome to my publications page! Here you will find a curated collection of my research contributions and scientific publications. Explore a diverse range of topics spanning health data analysis, bioinformatics, machine learning, and public health research. Dive into the insights and discoveries derived from my work as I strive to advance knowledge and make a meaningful impact in the scientific community.



## Journal Articles

:::{#articles}
:::

## Conference Papers 

:::{#conference-papers}
:::


## In Review 

:::{#reviews}
:::

## Working Papers

:::{#working-papers}
:::
